creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 145672
patch for updating port

- Update to ver 0.20.0.1
- Remove unnecessary BUILD_DEPENDS and RUN_DEPENDS

The proposed version of the port has passed tests on FreeBSD-10.0 (amd64) with:

- poudriere testport -j 10-amd64 -o security/p5-openxpki-i18n > i18n-poudriere.log
(log attached herewith)
